clauses.text: Hello Tutor LLC ("Hello Tutor", "we", "us", "our") is committed to providing the highest standard of safeguarding across all aspects of our platform. The safety and wellbeing of every user, and in particular children and young people, is our paramount concern.
Our platform, services, and all coordinating policies have been designed to ensure that students, parents, legal guardians, and tutors can interact in a safe, trusted, and respectful environment.
This Safeguarding Policy applies to all individuals who access or use the Hello Tutor platform, whether as a student, parent, legal guardian, or tutor ("Users").
By registering for or using our platform, all Users confirm that they have read, understood, and agreed to the terms of this Policy.
Our platform and coordinating policies have been developed to ensure we comply with all relevant safeguarding and child protection legislation applicable in the United Arab Emirates.
This Policy is informed by UAE Federal Law No. 3 of 2016 on Child Rights (Wadeema's Law), which establishes the rights of children to protection from all forms of harm, abuse, and neglect.

This Policy also takes into account the UAE Cybercrime Law (Federal Decree-Law No. 34 of 2021), relevant provisions of the UAE Penal Code, and any applicable regulations issued by the UAE Ministry of Community Development.
This Safeguarding Policy should be read in conjunction with our Terms and Conditions and our Privacy Policy.
We reserve the right to amend this Policy at any time. Users will be notified of material changes via the platform or by email.
Hello Tutor seeks to provide the best service possible and to create a safe experience in which children and young people can learn and develop.

This Policy aims to ensure we safeguard all Users of the Hello Tutor platform, including students, parents, legal guardians, and tutors, while they engage with our platform and participate in Lessons.

This Policy outlines the safeguarding responsibilities of Hello Tutor, tutors, students, and parents and legal guardians, and it is important that all Users familiarise themselves with its contents before using the platform.
If any User has a concern regarding the safety or welfare of a child or young person, they must contact Hello Tutor immediately at safeguarding@hellotutor.me.
Contravention of any of the terms contained within this Policy may result in immediate suspension of access to, and permanent removal from, our platform and services.
Hello Tutor will decide when a tutor's profile is sufficiently complete and verified to be made live on the platform and accessible by other Users.
Hello Tutor will use reasonable endeavours to verify the identity of all tutors before approving their profile, including checking government-issued identity documents and relevant qualifications.

Hello Tutor requires all tutors to have completed a background check dated within the last three years before they are permitted to conduct sessions through the platform. Background checks must meet the requirements set out in our Terms and Conditions. Tutors must provide Hello Tutor with evidence of their background check status upon request.

Hello Tutor requires new tutors to provide two written references from individuals who are not family members, confirming the referee's relationship to the tutor and consenting to the reference being shared with prospective students. Hello Tutor is not responsible for the accuracy or content of these references.

Hello Tutor requires all tutors who are not UAE nationals to hold a valid work permit or freelance permit issued by the Ministry of Human Resources and Emiratisation (MOHRE), or an equivalent permit issued by the relevant free zone authority, that legally entitles them to provide tutoring or educational services in the UAE on a self-employed or freelance basis. Tutors must provide Hello Tutor with evidence of their permit status upon request. Failure to hold or maintain a valid and applicable permit will result in the immediate suspension of a tutor's profile until this requirement is met.

Hello Tutor will rank tutors on the platform based on a combination of profile completeness, student ratings, and the number of lessons taught. Positive student ratings, prompt responses, repeat bookings, and a greater volume of lessons delivered will contribute to a higher ranking. Hello Tutor reserves the right to change the ranking methodology at any time.
Hello Tutor encourages students and parents to leave a review of any tutor they have sessions with. "Review" means any review, comment, or rating.
Hello Tutor will take precautions it considers reasonable to protect the personal information of all students, parents, and tutors on the platform.
Hello Tutor will protect all personal data in accordance with applicable UAE data protection legislation and our Privacy Policy.

Hello Tutor will monitor messages and activity posted on the platform and sent between students and tutors. Hello Tutor does so to facilitate introductions between students and tutors, to prevent misuse of the platform, and to safeguard all Users, particularly those who are under 18.

Hello Tutor will record all online sessions (except where an unforeseen technical malfunction occurs) and store those recordings for a minimum of 28 days and a maximum of one year. These recordings remain the property of Hello Tutor.
Hello Tutor may review any recorded session at any time for the purposes of improving our service or where a complaint or safeguarding report has been made.

Hello Tutor will deal with reports of possible illegal activity promptly, focusing on the safety and wellbeing of all Users. Hello Tutor will cooperate fully with UAE law enforcement and share any relevant session recordings where a criminal offence may have occurred.
Hello Tutor has a designated Safeguarding Officer who is responsible for handling all safeguarding concerns raised through the platform and for liaising with relevant UAE authorities where necessary.
Hello Tutor will endeavour to ensure that all complaints and safeguarding reports are considered promptly and in accordance with our Terms and Conditions.
Hello Tutor will regularly review this Policy and our Terms and Conditions to ensure they remain adequate, up to date, and aligned with current UAE safeguarding standards and legislation.
Tutors are independent contractors and are not employees of Hello Tutor. Tutors are solely responsible for their own actions both on and off the platform.

If tutors contact or teach students who are under 18, they must ensure that those students are represented by a parent or legal guardian who has given their consent for the student to receive tuition.
Tutors may cancel a session if no parent or legal guardian is present during a lesson with a learner who is under 18 and either the tutor or the learner does not feel comfortable continuing.

Tutors are responsible for ensuring that all personal information they provide on the platform, including their profile, qualifications, and personal statements, is accurate, complete, and not misleading. They must update this information promptly to maintain its accuracy.
Tutors must not post, share, or transmit any defamatory, offensive, inappropriate, or illegal material through the platform, including in messages, profile content, or session communications.
Tutors must immediately report to Hello Tutor any defamatory, offensive, or illegal material they encounter on the platform.

Tutors must disclose to Hello Tutor any criminal convictions or cautions they hold at the time of registration, and must disclose any convictions or cautions received at any time after registering on the platform for as long as they remain a registered tutor.
Tutors must disclose to Hello Tutor any other relevant information that may lead Hello Tutor to determine that they are not suitable to provide tutoring services through the platform.

All tutors must have a valid background check dated within the last three years. This must meet the requirements set out in the Terms and Conditions. Failure to maintain a valid background check will result in the immediate suspension of the tutor's profile until this requirement is met.

Tutors must hold and maintain a valid work permit or freelance permit issued by the Ministry of Human Resources and Emiratisation (MOHRE), or an equivalent permit issued by the relevant free zone authority, that legally entitles them to provide tutoring or educational services in the UAE on a self-employed or freelance basis. Tutors must provide Hello Tutor with evidence of their permit status upon request. Failure to hold or maintain a valid and applicable permit will result in the immediate suspension of the tutor's profile until this requirement is met.

Tutors must use their own judgement about whether they wish to offer their tuition services to each individual student. Tutors must take every reasonable precaution to ensure they work in a safe environment and are responsible for taking out and maintaining their own insurance to cover the work they undertake.
Tutors must ensure that their session environment does not display any inappropriate images, materials, or documents that could be visible to students during an online session.
Tutors must treat all students fairly and without prejudice or discrimination on the basis of age, culture, ability, gender, language, racial origin, religious belief, or any other characteristic.
Tutors must ensure that all reasonable steps are taken to protect students from harm, discrimination, and demeaning treatment and to respect their rights at all times.
Tutors must value students and take their contributions seriously during sessions.
Tutors must ensure they work in partnership with parents and guardians where the student is under 18, as this is essential for the protection and welfare of young learners.
Tutors must ensure the language they use in all communications with students is appropriate, professional, and not offensive or discriminatory.
Tutors must not make any improper or inappropriate suggestions to students at any time.
Tutors must ensure that any contact or communication they have with a student is appropriate to their role as a tutor and confined to the subject area for which they have been engaged.

Tutors must ensure there is no inappropriate communication between themselves and any student, whether on or outside the platform, and must report any unsolicited communication from a student to Hello Tutor if appropriate.

Tutors must not attempt to contact students or parents outside of the Hello Tutor platform using personal contact details obtained through the platform, without the explicit consent of the student or parent and Hello Tutor.
Tutors are responsible for their own online and offline security in connection with their use of the platform.
Tutors must report any complaint in line with our Terms and Conditions.
Tutors must report any safeguarding concern or suspected illegal activity immediately to Hello Tutor at safeguarding@hellotutor.me.

Students must be at least 18 years old to register for an account and book a tutor for themselves or another learner. Learners under the age of 18 must be represented by a parent or legal guardian who provides their consent for the learner to receive tuition. Hello Tutor is not responsible for any dispute regarding parental consent.
Students must ensure that all personal details and contact information they provide on the platform are accurate and kept up to date.

Students must ensure there is no inappropriate communication between themselves, a learner they represent, and the tutor, whether on or outside the platform, and must report any unsolicited contact from a tutor if appropriate.

Students must exercise their own judgement regarding the accuracy of information provided on the platform. Hello Tutor cannot guarantee that all content on the platform is complete, accurate, or up to date.

Students must use their own judgement about the suitability of any tutor they book. Although Hello Tutor undertakes certain checks before approving a tutor's profile, students are responsible for verifying any claims made by a tutor that may influence their decision to proceed, including qualifications and experience. We recommend doing so prior to, or at the beginning of, their first session with a tutor.
Students are solely responsible for all content they post on the platform, including messages sent, and must not post any defamatory, offensive, misleading, or illegal material.
Students must immediately report to Hello Tutor any defamatory, offensive, or illegal material they encounter on the platform.

Any student who is the parent or legal guardian of a learner under the age of 18 who has a session with a tutor should not leave the child in the unsupervised sole care of that tutor. They must remain available so that the learner can report any inappropriate behaviour or concerns, and learners must report any concerns to a parent or guardian immediately.
Students must ensure the physical or digital environment in which sessions take place is appropriate and safe.
Students must ensure that tutors are treated with respect and are not subjected to abusive, offensive, or discriminatory behaviour or language.
Students must not make any improper or inappropriate suggestions to tutors at any time.
Students are responsible for their own security in connection with their use of the platform, both online and offline.
Students must report any complaint in line with our Terms and Conditions.
Students must report any safeguarding concern or suspected illegal activity immediately to Hello Tutor at safeguarding@hellotutor.me.

The parent or legal guardian is responsible for selecting a tutor and making any reasonable checks to satisfy themselves that the tutor is suitable for the learner, including reviewing the tutor's identity verification and background check status as displayed on the platform.
The parent or legal guardian must ensure that the learner is fully aware of Hello Tutor's Safeguarding Policy before using the platform.
The parent or legal guardian is responsible for the welfare and wellbeing of the learner at all times during any session conducted through the platform.
The parent or legal guardian is responsible for the physical or digital environment of the learner during a session and must ensure it is safe, appropriate, and free from any risk.

The parent or legal guardian should, where they consider it appropriate, be present or remain available during a session so that the learner can report any concerns immediately and so that they can ensure both the learner and the tutor are behaving appropriately.

The parent or legal guardian must not leave a child under the age of 18 in the unsupervised sole care of a tutor during an online session. Learners must be able to report any concerns to a parent or guardian without delay.

The parent or legal guardian must use their best endeavours to ensure the learner treats tutors with respect and does not subject any tutor to abusive, inappropriate, or discriminatory behaviour or language.
The parent or legal guardian must ensure the learner has no inappropriate communication with any tutor outside of the Hello Tutor platform messaging and lesson sessions.
The parent or legal guardian must report any unsolicited communication between the tutor and the learner to Hello Tutor if appropriate.
The parent or legal guardian must report any dispute with a tutor to Hello Tutor in accordance with our Terms and Conditions.
The parent or legal guardian must report any inappropriate behaviour or suspected illegal activity by a tutor to Hello Tutor immediately at safeguarding@hellotutor.me.
The parent or legal guardian consents, on behalf of the learner, to the recording of online sessions for safeguarding and quality purposes, as described in clause 4.11 of this Policy.
The parent or legal guardian is responsible for ensuring that all personal information provided on behalf of the learner is accurate and kept up to date.

Any student or tutor reported for a breach of this Safeguarding Policy will be immediately suspended from the platform pending investigation by Hello Tutor and, where appropriate, the relevant UAE authorities. The User will be informed of their suspension. The User who reported the breach may be informed of the outcome where appropriate.
Hello Tutor reserves the right to make a final decision on the action taken in respect of minor breaches of this Safeguarding Policy.

Any student or tutor reported for illegal activity whilst using the Hello Tutor platform may be permanently barred from the service, reported to UAE law enforcement, and reported to any other relevant UAE authorities or organisations.

Hello Tutor will cooperate fully with any investigation carried out by UAE law enforcement or regulatory authorities and will provide access to session recordings, communications, and other relevant data where required to do so by law.

Where a safeguarding concern relates to a child or young person, Hello Tutor will prioritise the immediate safety and welfare of that individual above all other considerations when determining the appropriate course of action.
This Safeguarding Policy will be reviewed by Hello Tutor on a regular basis to ensure it remains adequate, relevant, and aligned with current UAE safeguarding standards and legislation.
Where material changes are made to this Policy, Hello Tutor will notify Users via the platform or by email prior to the changes taking effect.
The date of the most recent update is always shown at the top of this page. Continued use of the platform following notification of any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.
For any safeguarding concerns, reports of inappropriate behaviour, or questions relating to this Policy, please contact our Safeguarding Officer immediately at safeguarding@hellotutor.me.
For general enquiries about the platform, contact us at support@hellotutor.me.
You may also write to us at: Hello Tutor LLC, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
Hello Tutor will acknowledge all safeguarding reports as a priority and will respond to general enquiries within 2 working days.

tutorCodeOfConduct.metaTitle: Tutor Code of Conduct | Hello Tutor Teaching Standards UAE
tutorCodeOfConduct.metaDescription: Professional standards and conduct expectations for all Hello Tutor online tutors in Dubai & UAE. Understand our quality, safety and safeguarding requirements.
tutorCodeOfConduct.heroSubtitle: The experience a student has in a session depends almost entirely on the person teaching them. We take that seriously.
tutorCodeOfConduct.heroBody: By joining Hello Tutor, you are agreeing to uphold the principles set out in this document. As a tutor, you hold a position of trust. Students and their families are counting on you not just for academic support, but for encouragement, patience, and genuine care.

guidelines.title: Guidelines
guidelines.subtitle: Guidelines that ensure safe, respectful, and professional tutoring.

items.title: Be on time
items.desc: Arrive prepared for each session, ideally a few minutes early so you are ready to start when your student is. Punctuality sets the tone for the entire lesson.

items.title: Look and sound the part
items.desc: Join sessions from a tidy, quiet space that is free from distractions. Make sure your device, camera, microphone, and internet connection are working properly before each session begins.

items.title: Communicate well
items.desc: Keep your language professional and appropriate at all times, whether during sessions or in messages through the platform. Be responsive to students, parents, and the Hello Tutor team.

items.title: Keep your profile up to date
items.desc: Make sure your availability, qualifications, and personal details on the platform are accurate and current. Notify us promptly if anything changes that could affect your suitability to tutor.

supportingStudents.title: Supporting Your Students
supportingStudents.subtitle: Guidance on supporting students with care, professionalism, and integrity.

items.title: Put students first
items.desc: Your role is to guide, encourage, and build real understanding. Tailor your approach to each student's needs and always prioritise their wellbeing.

items.title: Give meaningful feedback
items.desc: After sessions, provide constructive and thoughtful feedback that helps students and parents understand progress and next steps.

items.title: Stay within your role
items.desc: Do not complete assignments, assessments, or any graded work on behalf of students. Your job is to support their learning, not to do it for them.

items.title: Keep things professional
items.desc: Maintain clear boundaries with students and their families at all times. Do not show favouritism or make promises you cannot keep.

contentSections.title: Keeping Communication Safe and Appropriate
contentSections.body: All communication with students and parents must take place through the Hello Tutor platform. Do not share your personal contact details or ask for theirs, and do not move conversations to personal phone numbers, social media, or any other channel outside of Hello Tutor.
contentSections.body2: Do not arrange or attempt to meet students outside of scheduled Hello Tutor sessions, whether online or in person.

contentSections.title: Treating Everyone with Respect
contentSections.body: Hello Tutor welcomes students from all backgrounds and we expect our tutors to reflect that. Treat every student, parent, and fellow tutor with respect and professionalism. Discriminatory, abusive, threatening, or sexually inappropriate behaviour of any kind will not be tolerated.
contentSections.body2: Do not belittle, patronise, or speak dismissively to students. Every learner deserves to feel safe, valued, and supported.

contentSections.title: Keeping Students Safe
contentSections.body: If you notice anything during a session that raises a concern about a student's wellbeing or safety, report it to the Hello Tutor team straight away. Do not ignore concerns, however small they may seem. We would always rather hear about something that turns out to be nothing than have a genuine concern go unreported.
contentSections.body2: Do not share any information about a student, including their academic performance or personal circumstances, with anyone outside of Hello Tutor without explicit consent.

contentSections.title: Working Exclusively Through Hello Tutor
contentSections.body: Tutors are not permitted to offer or provide private tutoring to students they have been connected with through Hello Tutor outside of the platform. This applies for the duration of your time with us and beyond.

contentSections.title: What Happens If This Is Not Followed
contentSections.body: We hope every tutor joins Hello Tutor because they genuinely care about making a difference for students. Where this Code of Conduct is not followed, Hello Tutor reserves the right to suspend or permanently remove a tutor from the platform. In serious cases, matters will be referred to the relevant authorities.

tutorCodeOfConduct.thankYou: Thank you for the care and commitment you bring to your students. It is what makes Hello Tutor work.

contactStrip.title: Questions about the Code of Conduct?
contactStrip.body: If you need clarification on any of these guidelines, or you want to report a concern, our team is here to help.

studentCodeOfConduct.metaTitle: Student Code of Conduct | Hello Tutor | hellotutor.me
studentCodeOfConduct.metaDescription: Expected behaviour and conduct standards for students on Hello Tutor's online tutoring platform in Dubai & UAE. Read before your first lesson.
studentCodeOfConduct.heroSubtitle: We want every session to be a positive experience. That means creating an environment where students feel supported and tutors feel respected.
studentCodeOfConduct.heroBody: If a student is under 18, we ask that a parent or guardian take responsibility for making sure these guidelines are read, understood, and followed. By registering on Hello Tutor, you are agreeing to be part of a community built on trust, respect, and a shared commitment to learning.

prepSection.title: Turning Up Ready to Learn
prepSection.subtitle: Simple habits that help you get the most out of every session.

items.title: Arrive on time and prepared
items.desc: Your tutor has set aside dedicated time for you, and showing up ready makes a real difference to what you can achieve together. Make sure your device, camera, and internet connection are working before the session starts.

items.title: Create the right environment
items.desc: Joining from a quiet space, free from distractions, will help you get the most out of your time. A tidy, well-lit space helps both you and your tutor focus on what matters.

contentSections.title: Treating Everyone with Respect
contentSections.body: Hello Tutor is a place where students from all backgrounds come to learn. We expect everyone to treat tutors and fellow users with respect at all times. This includes the language used during sessions and in any messages sent through the platform.
contentSections.body2: Harassment or discrimination of any kind will not be tolerated and may result in immediate removal from the platform.

contentSections.title: Keeping Communication Appropriate
contentSections.body: All communication between students and tutors should take place through the Hello Tutor platform. Students should not attempt to contact tutors through personal phone numbers, social media, or any other channel outside of Hello Tutor. Arranging or attempting to meet a tutor outside of scheduled sessions, whether online or in person, is not permitted.
contentSections.body2: Sessions are for learning. Please keep conversations focused and appropriate at all times. Using abusive, threatening, or sexually inappropriate language or behaviour toward anyone on the platform will not be tolerated under any circumstances.

contentSections.title: Learning with Integrity
contentSections.body: Hello Tutor is here to support your learning, not to do it for you. We expect students to use the platform in good faith. Tutors are not permitted to complete assignments, assessments, or examinations on behalf of students, and students should not request this.

contentSections.title: Keeping Students Safe
contentSections.body: If anything happens during a session that makes you feel uncomfortable or unsafe, please report it to us straight away. We take every concern seriously and will always act on it promptly. Your safety matters to us and we are here to help.

contentSections.title: What Happens If This Is Not Followed
contentSections.body: We hope students choose to uphold this Code of Conduct because they understand why it matters, not simply because they have to. However, where these guidelines are not followed, Hello Tutor reserves the right to suspend or permanently remove access to the platform. In serious cases, matters will be referred to the relevant authorities.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: How soon will I hear back?
items.answer: We aim to respond to all enquiries within two working days, usually much quicker than that.

items.question: Can I book a consultation directly?
items.answer: Yes. Just fill in the contact form or email us at support@hellotutor.me and we'll get something set up.

items.question: Do you offer free consultations?
items.answer: Yes — and it's completely free. Book a consultation and we'll take it from there. We'll get to know what you're looking for, answer any questions you have, and match you with the right tutor. Over 5,000 families have trusted us to make the match.

items.question: What information do you need from me?
items.answer: It helps to know your child's year group, the subject or subjects they need support with, and anything specific they're finding difficult. Don't worry if you're not sure. We'll figure it out together.

items.question: Can I speak to someone before committing to anything?
items.answer: Absolutely. That's exactly what the free consultation is for. There's no obligation and no pressure. We just want to understand what your child needs.

items.question: I'm interested in becoming a tutor. Should I use this form?
items.answer: Yes, feel free to reach out here and we'll point you in the right direction. Alternatively, head to the Become a Tutor page to find out more about the application process.

contactPage.metaDescription: Get in touch with Hello Tutor. Book a free consultation, ask about tutors, pricing, or subjects. Expert support for IGCSE, IB & A-Level students in Dubai & UAE.

hero.title: Teach. Inspire. Make a difference.
hero.subtitle: Join a tutoring community that values quality, consistency, and real relationships with students.

whyTutor.title: Why Tutor with Hello Tutor
whyTutor.subtitle: We provide the platform, you provide the passion. Here are the benefits of joining our community.

cards.title: Reliable student assignments
cards.desc: We bring students to you. No marketing, no cold outreach, no waiting for enquiries. We match you to students who need your specific subject and level.

cards.title: Competitive pay
cards.desc: Competitive rates, paid promptly through the platform. No chasing invoices. No awkward money conversations with parents.

cards.title: Hassle-free tutoring
cards.desc: We handle matching, scheduling, and payments so you can focus on teaching.

cards.title: Ongoing support
cards.desc: You're not alone. Pedagogical guidance, platform training, and responses when you need help.

cards.title: Flexible remote work
cards.desc: Teach from anywhere. Set your availability. Work around your life.

cards.title: Meaningful impact
cards.desc: Watch your students grow in confidence, capability, and belief in themselves.

whoWereLookingFor.title: Who We're Looking For
whoWereLookingFor.subtitle: We're selective. We work with graduates from leading universities who have the subject knowledge and the communication skills to get real results for students.

items.title: Strong subject knowledge
items.desc: A degree from a leading university in the subject you teach.

items.title: Clear communicators
items.desc: Able to explain complex concepts in simple, engaging ways.

items.title: Reliable and professional
items.desc: Consistent, punctual, responsive.

items.title: Empathetic educators
items.desc: You understand that every student is different, and you adapt your approach.

items.title: Online teaching ability
items.desc: Comfortable using technology to create interactive, engaging lessons.

testimonial.text: I love the flexibility of tutoring with Hello Tutor. I set my hours, work from home, and actually get to know my students over time. The team is responsive, and I always feel supported. It's the most rewarding teaching I've done.
testimonial.author: — Karim, A-Level Maths Tutor

applicationProcess.title: Our Application Process
applicationProcess.subtitle: Four simple steps to launch your tutoring career.

items.title: Apply Online
items.desc: A short application form. Takes about 5 minutes.

items.title: Interview & Teaching Assessment
items.desc: A short video call and teaching demonstration. Walk us through how you'd explain a concept to a student.

items.title: Safeguarding & Onboarding
items.desc: DBS check, MOHRE registration, reference verification, and a platform walkthrough. We make this as simple as possible.

items.title: Start Teaching
items.desc: We match you with your first student. Then you get going.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: Do I get to choose my students?
items.answer: We handle the matching, but we take your subject expertise, availability, and preferences into account. You won't be assigned students who aren't a good fit for you.

items.question: How many students will I have?
items.answer: That depends entirely on your availability. You're in control of your schedule.

items.question: What's the pay structure?
items.answer: Your rate is agreed during onboarding and is based on the education level and subject you teach. The total lesson fee also includes Hello Tutor's service fee, which covers platform and booking infrastructure. Full details are shared during the application process.

items.question: Is there onboard training?
items.answer: Yes. You'll get platform training when you start, plus ongoing support to help you get the most out of your lessons.

items.question: What if a student isn't the right fit?
items.answer: Let us know and we'll work through it with you. We can make adjustments or arrange a new match. Everything goes through Hello Tutor, so there's no awkwardness.

items.question: Can I tutor more than one subject?
items.answer: Yes, if you have the knowledge and experience to do it well. Tell us what you're qualified to teach during your application and we'll factor that into how we match you with students.

cta.title: Ready to start teaching?
cta.subtitle: The application takes about 5 minutes. If you're a good fit, you'll hear from us within a few days.

privacyPolicy.heroSubtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information. Transparent, secure, and aligned with UAE data protection standards.

1.title: 16 Policy Sections
1.desc: Comprehensive coverage across all data practices.

2.title: 6 Years Retention
2.desc: Account data kept securely after your last activity.

3.title: PCI-DSS Compliant
3.desc: Payment card data handled by certified providers.

4.title: UAE PDPL Aligned
4.desc: Governing law for all personal data processing.

rightsGrid.title: Your Data Rights at a Glance

contactStrip.title: Need to get in touch?
contactStrip.body: For privacy-related questions, data requests, or concerns about how we handle your information, reach us on the email that matches your need.

clauses.text: Hello Tutor LLC ("Hello Tutor", "we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting the privacy of all users of our platform. The protection of your personal data is our paramount concern.
Our platform, services, and all coordinating policies have been designed to ensure that students, parents, and tutors can interact in a safe and trusted environment.
This Privacy Policy applies to all individuals who access or use the Hello Tutor website, mobile applications, or services, whether as a student, parent, legal guardian, or tutor ("Users").
By registering for or using our platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to the terms of this Privacy Policy.
Our platform and coordinating policies have been developed to ensure we comply with all relevant data protection legislation applicable in the United Arab Emirates.
This Policy is governed primarily by the UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 on the Protection of Personal Data (PDPL) and its implementing regulations.

Where applicable, this Policy also takes into account the DIFC Data Protection Law 2020, the UAE Cybercrime Law (Federal Decree-Law No. 34 of 2021), and the regulations of the Telecommunications and Digital Government Regulatory Authority (TDRA).
This Privacy Policy should be read in conjunction with our Terms and Conditions and our Safeguarding Policy.
We reserve the right to amend this Policy at any time. Users will be notified of material changes via the platform or by email.
Hello Tutor seeks to provide the best service possible and to handle all personal data with the highest standards of care, transparency, and security.
This Policy aims to ensure that all Users, including students, parents, legal guardians, and tutors, understand what data we hold about them and how it is used.

This Policy outlines the responsibilities of Hello Tutor, tutors, students, and parents in relation to the collection and use of personal data, and it is important that all Users familiarise themselves with its contents.
If any User has a concern regarding how their personal data is being handled, they must contact Hello Tutor immediately at privacy@hellotutor.me.
Contravention of any of the terms contained within this Policy may result in immediate suspension of access to and permanent removal from our services.
Account information: when you register on the platform, we collect your full name, email address, phone number, and date of birth.
Tutor profile information: tutors provide details including their educational background, qualifications, subjects taught, profile photograph, written bio, availability, and tutoring experience.

Identity verification documents: tutors are required to provide a valid Emirates ID or passport, proof of UAE residence, and university enrolment certificates or degree certificates where applicable, to verify their identity before their profile is made live on the platform.

Work permit and licensing information: tutors are required to provide evidence of a valid work permit or freelance permit issued by the Ministry of Human Resources and Emiratisation (MOHRE), or an equivalent permit issued by the relevant free zone authority, confirming their legal entitlement to provide tutoring services in the UAE on a self-employed or freelance basis.
Background check information: where required, tutors are asked to provide the outcome of a background check conducted within the previous three years, in line with applicable UAE requirements.

Communications and message history: we store details of all communications between users on the platform, including messages, session requests, and interactions with the Hello Tutor support team, including recorded calls where consent has been obtained.

Booking and session history: we collect records of all bookings made through the platform, including the subject, level, date, and status of each session, as well as the results of any initial assessments conducted within the lesson space.

Session recordings: all online sessions conducted on our platform are recorded (except where an unforeseen technical malfunction occurs) and stored for safeguarding and quality purposes. These recordings remain the property of Hello Tutor.

Payment and financial information: students provide payment card details to make bookings, and tutors provide bank account details to receive payments. These details are processed via our secure, PCI-DSS compliant payment provider. We do not store full card numbers on our servers.
Reviews and ratings: students and parents may leave reviews and ratings for tutors after sessions.
Referral and promotional data: we record details of referral codes shared and redeemed, and other promotions you interact with, in order to apply any applicable rewards to your account.

Technical and usage data: we automatically collect data about how you use the platform, including your IP address, device type, browser type and version, operating system, pages visited, time spent on the platform, click-stream data, and error logs.
Cookie data: we collect data via cookies and similar tracking technologies as described in Section 13 of this Policy.

Tutor availability and engagement data: we collect information on tutors' on-platform behaviour, response times, availability, and interactions with other users, to ensure students are matched with the most suitable tutor for their needs.
To create and manage your account on the platform and to verify your identity.
To enable tutors to create and maintain a profile on the platform so that they can be found and matched with suitable students.
To match students with suitable tutors based on their learning needs, subject requirements, availability, and other relevant criteria, and to personalise the platform experience accordingly.
To enable communication between users on the platform and to provide booking, scheduling, and lesson management services.
To process payments from students and disbursements to tutors for lessons booked through the platform.
To record, store, and review online sessions for safeguarding and quality assurance purposes.
To provide customer support to both students and tutors.
To monitor in-platform messages and activity to prevent misuse of the platform, safeguard minors, and detect fraudulent or inappropriate behaviour.
To assess tutor applications, including verifying that qualifications, identity documents, and work permits meet our requirements before a profile is approved.
To send you service-related notifications, booking confirmations, payment receipts, and important updates about your account.

To send you promotional communications, special offers, and information about our services, where you have given your consent or where we have a legitimate interest in doing so. You may opt out at any time.
To improve the technical performance of the platform, identify and resolve errors, and develop new features and services.
To conduct research and analysis to better understand our users and improve our matching outcomes.
To apply and track referral rewards, promotional codes, and discounts.
To comply with our legal obligations, including obligations under UAE data protection, commercial, and cybercrime legislation.
To protect the rights, property, and safety of Hello Tutor, our users, and the public.

sections.title: Legal Bases for Processing Your Data

clauses.text: Contractual necessity: much of our processing is necessary to fulfil our contract with you and provide the services you have requested. Without this data, we cannot operate our platform or deliver our matching and booking services.

Legitimate interests: we process certain data where it is in our legitimate interests as a business to do so, such as fraud prevention, improving the platform, safeguarding users, and communicating about our services, provided these interests are not overridden by your rights.

Consent: where required, we will ask for your explicit consent before processing your data, for example for marketing communications or the processing of sensitive personal data. You may withdraw consent at any time.
Legal obligation: we process data where necessary to comply with applicable UAE law, including requests from law enforcement or regulatory authorities.
Vital interests: in rare circumstances, we may process data where it is necessary to protect the life or safety of a user or a third party.

sections.title: Who We Share Your Information With

clauses.text: Matched tutors and students: where a student is matched with a tutor through the platform, limited personal information will be shared with the relevant tutor to facilitate the introduction, including the student's first name, the subject and level requested, and the contents of their initial message. Tutor profile information, including their first name, profile photo, qualifications, bio, subjects, and reviews, is visible to all visitors of the platform.

Payment providers: we share financial data with our secure payment processing partner to facilitate payments in connection with lessons arranged through the platform. Card details are not stored on Hello Tutor's servers.

Identity, permit, and background check providers: tutor identity documents, MOHRE permit information, and background check data may be shared with our verification partners for the purposes of screening and compliance.
Analytics providers: we share anonymised usage data with analytics platforms to understand how users interact with the platform and improve our matching service.
Communications platforms: we use third-party platforms to send emails, SMS notifications, and in-app messages. Limited personal data is shared with these providers for this purpose.

Cloud hosting and storage providers: personal data is stored on secure cloud servers operated by our hosting partners. All providers are contractually required to maintain appropriate security standards.
Customer support platforms: we use third-party tools to manage customer support requests. Support staff may access relevant account information to resolve queries.
Marketing platforms: with your consent, we may share limited data with digital marketing platforms to deliver relevant promotional content.

Legal and regulatory authorities: we may disclose personal data to UAE law enforcement, regulatory bodies, or other competent authorities where required by law, including under the UAE Cybercrime Law and PDPL. This includes providing access to session recordings where a criminal offence may have occurred.

All third-party providers who process personal data on our behalf are bound by data processing agreements and are required to process data only on Hello Tutor's instructions and to the same standard of protection we apply.
We do not sell your personal data to any third party.

International transfers: some of our service providers are located outside the UAE. Where personal data is transferred internationally, we ensure that appropriate safeguards are in place, including contractual protections that require recipients to protect data to the same standard required by UAE law.

sections.title: How Long We Keep Your Data

clauses.text: We retain personal data for as long as is necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by applicable UAE law.

Account data is retained for six years from the date of your last activity on the platform. This period reflects the typical lifecycle of a Hello Tutor user and allows you to resume using the platform within that time.

Session recordings are kept for a minimum of 28 days and a maximum of one year from the date of the session, unless a longer period is required due to an ongoing complaint, safeguarding investigation, or legal proceeding.
Financial records, including payment history, invoices, and transaction data, are retained for a minimum of five years in line with UAE commercial record-keeping requirements.
Identity verification documents and work permit records are retained for the duration of a tutor's active registration plus three years, or as otherwise required by law.
Marketing data is retained until you withdraw your consent or opt out of marketing communications.

Reviews and ratings submitted by students may remain visible on the platform after a tutor's account has been closed, but will be anonymised so that they can no longer be linked to an identifiable individual.

After the applicable retention period has expired, or following a valid deletion request (whichever is earlier), personal data will be securely deleted or irreversibly anonymised, subject to any overriding legal obligation to retain it.

Hello Tutor takes the security of your personal data seriously and has implemented appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect it against accidental loss, unauthorised access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.
All data transmitted between users and the platform is encrypted using industry-standard TLS/SSL encryption.
Sensitive data, including financial information and identity documents, is stored in encrypted form on our servers.
Access to personal data within Hello Tutor is restricted on a role-by-role basis, and only staff who require access to personal data to perform their specific role are permitted to do so.
We conduct regular security assessments and monitor our systems for vulnerabilities and potential breaches.

Despite our efforts, no method of data transmission or storage is entirely secure. You acknowledge that email and internet communications are inherently not fully secure and you transmit information at your own risk. We recommend that you never share sensitive personal information by email.

In the event of a personal data breach that poses a risk to users' rights and freedoms, Hello Tutor will notify affected users and report to the relevant regulatory authority in accordance with UAE PDPL requirements.

Users are responsible for keeping their account login credentials secure and must not share their password with any third party. If you believe your account has been compromised, you must contact us immediately at privacy@hellotutor.me.
Under the UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 on the Protection of Personal Data, you have the following rights in relation to the personal data we hold about you.

Right of access: you may request a copy of the personal data we hold about you by submitting a Subject Access Request to privacy@hellotutor.me with the subject line "Subject Access Request". We will respond within 30 days.

Right to rectification: you have the right to request correction of any inaccurate or incomplete personal data we hold about you. Most of your information can be updated directly through your account settings.

Right to erasure: you may request that we delete your personal data where we no longer have a lawful basis to retain it. To request deletion, email privacy@hellotutor.me with the subject line "Data Deletion Request". We may be unable to comply where we are required to retain data by law.
Right to data portability: where processing is based on your consent or a contract, you may request a copy of your personal data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format.

Right to withdraw consent: where processing is based on your consent, you may withdraw that consent at any time. Withdrawal of consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out before the withdrawal.
Right to restrict processing: you may ask us to suspend or limit how we process your personal data in certain circumstances, such as where you contest the accuracy of the data.
Right to object: you may object to processing of your personal data where we rely on legitimate interests as the legal basis, or where data is processed for direct marketing purposes.

Rights relating to automated decision-making: where we make automated decisions that significantly affect you, you have the right to request human review of that decision. Please contact privacy@hellotutor.me to exercise this right.
To exercise any of the above rights, please contact us at privacy@hellotutor.me. We may ask you to verify your identity before processing your request.

If you are not satisfied with our response, or believe we are processing your personal data not in accordance with the law, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the UAE Data Office at uaedataoffice.ae.

Hello Tutor uses automated systems to rank tutor profiles and match tutors with students based on factors including profile completeness, student ratings, response times, availability, and lesson history. These systems are designed to improve the quality and relevance of our matching outcomes.

We may use automated systems to detect suspicious activity, potential fraud, or behaviour that may breach our Terms and Conditions, which could result in account restrictions or suspension pending human review.

Where an automated decision has a significant effect on you, you have the right to request that the decision be reviewed by a member of the Hello Tutor team. To exercise this right, please contact privacy@hellotutor.me.
The Hello Tutor platform is intended for use by individuals who are at least 18 years old. We do not knowingly collect personal data directly from children under the age of 18.

Where a learner is under 18, their personal data is provided to us by the parent or legal guardian who holds the student account. That parent or guardian is responsible for the accuracy of any data submitted on the learner's behalf and for ensuring the learner's use of the platform is appropriate.
We take additional care when processing data relating to learners under 18, including restricting the visibility of that data and ensuring it is not used for marketing purposes.

If you believe we have inadvertently collected personal data from a child without appropriate parental consent, please contact us immediately at privacy@hellotutor.me and we will take prompt steps to delete that data.
A cookie is a small text file placed on your device when you visit our platform. Cookies allow us to recognise your device on return visits and enable certain platform features to function correctly.
Strictly necessary cookies are essential for the platform to function and cannot be disabled. They do not collect personal information for marketing purposes.

Performance cookies collect anonymised information about how users interact with the platform, such as which pages are visited most frequently and whether any error messages are received. This data is used solely to improve platform performance.
Functionality cookies allow the platform to remember your preferences, such as your login details and language settings, to provide you with a more personalised experience.
Targeting and advertising cookies track your browsing behaviour in order to deliver more relevant advertising on and off the platform. You may opt out of these cookies at any time.
We use Google Analytics to collect anonymised data about how users interact with the platform. You can opt out of Google Analytics tracking at tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout.
By continuing to use the platform after being presented with our cookie notice, you consent to our use of non-essential cookies.
You can manage, restrict, or block cookies through your browser settings at any time. Please be aware that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of parts of the platform.

Any user reported for a breach of this Privacy Policy or our Terms and Conditions will be immediately suspended from the platform pending investigation by Hello Tutor and, where appropriate, the relevant UAE authorities. The user will be informed of their suspension.
Hello Tutor reserves the right to make a final decision on the action taken in respect of minor breaches of this Policy.

Any user reported for illegal activity in connection with their use of the Hello Tutor platform may be permanently barred from the service, reported to UAE law enforcement, and reported to any other relevant authorities or organisations.

Any personal data breach discovered by Hello Tutor will be assessed promptly. Where the breach is likely to result in a risk to users' rights and freedoms, Hello Tutor will notify affected users and report to the UAE Data Office without undue delay and in accordance with UAE PDPL requirements.
This Privacy Policy will be reviewed by Hello Tutor on a regular basis to ensure it remains accurate, adequate, and aligned with current UAE data protection law and best practices.
Where material changes are made to this Policy, Hello Tutor will notify users via the platform or by email prior to the changes taking effect.
The date of the most recent update is always shown at the top of this page. Your continued use of the platform following notification of any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated Policy.
For any questions, concerns, or requests relating to this Privacy Policy or the way we handle your personal data, please contact our Data Protection team at privacy@hellotutor.me.
For safeguarding concerns, contact us at safeguarding@hellotutor.me.
You may also write to us at: Hello Tutor LLC, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
We aim to acknowledge all privacy-related enquiries within 5 working days and to provide a full response within 30 days.

clauses.text: Cookies are small text files, normally consisting of letters and numbers, which are placed on your device when you visit a website or use an online service. Your browser stores these files and sends them back to the relevant website on future visits.
Cookies help websites remember your preferences, keep you logged in, and understand how users interact with their services. They are a standard part of how the modern web works.

Some cookies are set directly by the Hello Tutor Services from the domains hellotutor.me and app.hellotutor.me. These are first-party cookies and are essential to the operation of the Hello Tutor Services.
They allow you to navigate the platform, log in to your account securely, maintain your session, and access features such as the online classroom, lesson summaries, and recordings.
These cookies do not gather information about you for marketing purposes and do not track your activity across other websites.

The Hello Tutor Services incorporate elements provided by trusted third parties. Some of these are essential for delivering the core functionality of the Hello Tutor Services, including secure payment processing, the online classroom, customer support, and platform security.
Cookies from the following domains are essential for this functionality: stripe.com, google.com, and cloudflare.com.
Some third-party cookies help us understand how users interact with the Hello Tutor Services so we can improve the platform and measure the effectiveness of our marketing.
You can still use the core functionality of the Hello Tutor Services if you block these cookies, but some features may not work as intended.
Cookies from the following domains are used to provide this functionality: google-analytics.com, googletagmanager.com, facebook.com, hotjar.com, and doubleclick.net.
Hello Tutor does not control how third parties use cookies on their own services. You should refer to each provider's own cookie or privacy policy to understand how they use cookies.
The Hello Tutor Services will not work without Hello Tutor's own essential cookies or the essential third-party cookies listed above.
The core functionality of the Hello Tutor Services will continue to work if optional third-party cookies are blocked.
Web browsers allow you to block or delete cookies set by websites or third parties. Instructions on how to manage cookies in commonly used browsers can be found at www.aboutcookies.org.
If you have any questions about this Cookie Policy, please contact us at privacy@hellotutor.me.
